faqs.question: Which courses does Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy offer to students?
faqs.answer: Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy has courses such as Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma to offer. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmacognosy.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
Pharm.D Candidate should have completed the age of Seventeen Years as on 31st December of 2023.
B.Pharma Candidates completed Diploma in Pharmacy and secured minimum of 45% marks (40% for SC, ST, OBC, Cat-1, 2A, 2B, 3A and 3B category candidates) from an institution approved by PCI are also eligibile to apply.
D.Pharma Candidate must have completed 17 years of age in the year of admission.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy offers Degree and Diploma courses including 2 UG and 2 PG courses. Additionally, it also has Doctorate courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmacognosy.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy is up to 166. Good thing to know is that Sharada Vilas College of Pharmacy has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE, PCI.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.

review_content.Placements: In our course there are a total of 100 seats are available and almost all seats are filled by the counseling conducted by PGIMS, Rohtak. The highest salary package offered to students is 16 LPA -18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. Generally, in dentistry, students are self-employed in their hospitals or join popular dentist clinics. The topmost role offered in our course is a dentist.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our classrooms, we have both screen projectors, as well as green boards so that students can clear doubts as per their needs. Teachers used to make diagrams in an easy way and give us a clear version of the topic they are going to teach as well. We have labs with sufficient equipment so that no student lacks behind in case of practical work. Our library is a room of knowledge where we can find the same subject books with different writers according to our preference.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college environment, staff members, and teachers.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are from Sirsa city, and 10% of students are from villages. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. About 30% of students from our course got an internship. Infosys company visit our college for placements. A top role is offered by JCD Vidyapeeth.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a good Wi-Fi facility in hostels, but average in the library. Facilities like sitting places and furniture are good as expected. The food available in the canteen and hostel is good. It also provides good medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking for the right college for your higher education, this can be a good option.

content.Placements: JCD Vidyapeeth College provides various kinds of job placement opportunities to the students, with job packages ranging from around 2 lakhs per annum to 4 lakhs per annum. The last top companies to visit our college were Tata Motors, Hyundai, Maruti Suzuki, Aditya Birla, etc.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to facilities and infrastructure, JCD Vidyapeeth College is quite wonderful. The buildings are well-maintained, and facilities like food, Wi-Fi, canteen, labs, and the library are available for every student.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dental college is a good and helpful if you are looking for BDS.

content.Placements: 85 students were placed. No package is provided yet. Stipends is provided to interns. No companies visit the campus for recruitments. 100% internship is guaranteed to the students. Stipend is a little bit low but it's okay. PG section is also available. Not only BDS, MS also available.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is available in the college. Labs are available. AC is non working. Library is a nice place. Hostel is not good. Mess food is just average. No generator service is provided at the time of power cut. Gym is there. Park is there. Strictness is there. You can't exit the campus, if you are residing in girl's hostel.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.

content.Placements: In our course there are a total of 100 seats are available and almost all seats are filled by the counseling conducted by PGIMS, Rohtak. The highest salary package offered to students is 16 LPA -18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. Generally, in dentistry, students are self-employed in their hospitals or join popular dentist clinics. The topmost role offered in our course is a dentist.
content.Infrastructure: In our classrooms, we have both screen projectors, as well as green boards so that students can clear doubts as per their needs. Teachers used to make diagrams in an easy way and give us a clear version of the topic they are going to teach as well. We have labs with sufficient equipment so that no student lacks behind in case of practical work. Our library is a room of knowledge where we can find the same subject books with different writers according to our preference.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college environment, staff members, and teachers.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are from Sirsa city, and 10% of students are from villages. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. About 30% of students from our course got an internship. Infosys company visit our college for placements. A top role is offered by JCD Vidyapeeth.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a good Wi-Fi facility in hostels, but average in the library. Facilities like sitting places and furniture are good as expected. The food available in the canteen and hostel is good. It also provides good medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is for acquiring good knowledge with very good staff members and faculty members.

content.Placements: I am a student of JCD dental college currently in 3rd year. I have good knowledge experience from here. Our batch is of 2018, and we are a batch of 55 students. As an undergraduate course, in the medical stream, we have many advantages due to the knowledge we are gaining in college.
content.Infrastructure: All the departments are available with well-developed equipment, and all the basic and necessary needs are fulfilled. We get very good food and medical facilities here. The campus has its own shooting range, along with basketball ground, football ground, cricket ground and a few parks to keep students healthy.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for the right college for your higher education, this can be a good option.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to facilities and infrastructure, JCD Vidyapeeth College is quite wonderful. The buildings are well-maintained, and facilities like food, Wi-Fi, canteen, labs, and the library are available for every student.

reviews.review_heading: Dental college is a good and helpful if you are looking for BDS.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is available in the college. Labs are available. AC is non working. Library is a nice place. Hostel is not good. Mess food is just average. No generator service is provided at the time of power cut. Gym is there. Park is there. Strictness is there. You can't exit the campus, if you are residing in girl's hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.
reviews.review_text: In our classrooms, we have both screen projectors, as well as green boards so that students can clear doubts as per their needs. Teachers used to make diagrams in an easy way and give us a clear version of the topic they are going to teach as well. We have labs with sufficient equipment so that no student lacks behind in case of practical work. Our library is a room of knowledge where we can find the same subject books with different writers according to our preference.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college environment, staff members, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a good Wi-Fi facility in hostels, but average in the library. Facilities like sitting places and furniture are good as expected. The food available in the canteen and hostel is good. It also provides good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is for acquiring good knowledge with very good staff members and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All the departments are available with well-developed equipment, and all the basic and necessary needs are fulfilled. We get very good food and medical facilities here. The campus has its own shooting range, along with basketball ground, football ground, cricket ground and a few parks to keep students healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college provides a good hostel facility. There are many grounds. Gym facility is available here. Quality of food served is good. There are many parks, museum and football ground. There is a hospital on the campus. Dental college and various other colleges are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and it provides many facilities and helps students in their growth.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, labs and a library with good quality internet are available. Air-conditioned rooms are available in the hostel with proper food, well cleaned, hygienic and also proper security is provided to the students for their safety. Sports like shooting, basketball, volleyball, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities but poor placements.
reviews.review_text: As this is a private college, the fee structure is high. Facilities provided by the college are very good, like free Wi-Fi, A/C classrooms, library and medical facilities. A sports meet is conducted every year for students who interested in sports. The campus has a cricket academy as well.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college of SIRSA.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms are better than other colleges situated in SIRSA.
There is a computer lab and library. They organise sports events every year. The food available in the canteen is average.
The hostel rooms are good and I didn't face any problem related to the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the campus crowd is great, dissatisfied with faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It was a renowned campus. We usually skip classes just because we enjoy sitting outside of the college building just because of the greenery and cleanliness of the campus. The campus of our college is very famous in all nearby districts.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty members, HOD's, and corrupt peoples. Please find any other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is well-maintained but for electrical/electronic guys the machines they provided was too old and that too not working or full of bugs. For CSE, you will find good machines, but you need to install software as per need. For mechanical, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth is a very bad college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. There are building for different courses. Every building has the canteen. There is one common canteen also. The infrastructure-wise, this college is the best college in Sirsa and nearby Sirsa cities. The hospital is also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: No placements,but only thing good in the college is its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The only thing good in the college is its infrastructure. A large ans beautiful campus with a number of courses in it. The thing infrastructure lack is proper laboratories and the Wi-Fi does not world properly. The library also lacks some of the good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: JCD MBA- Just degree, not career.
reviews.review_text: The basic infrastructure is good. The classrooms are good enough, with poor, hard seats like in old schools. Only fans are there in 45°C, No new teaching aids. Old book and blackboard method is followed for teaching. Wi-Fi is available but it is hardly of any use. Computer lab is there with basic facilities. Not much scope for sports. The hostels are messy and are common for all groups of colleges, resulting in a lot of issues.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and environment .
reviews.review_text:
Good hostel food every student of hostel was humble in nature and good medical facilities was provide to the students also there was a gym in the hostel where we were do gym and maintain our health 
The hostel food was freshly prepared every day 
The quality of food was vell good.

review_summary.college_name: ICFAI University Tripura Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, in this course, teachers are very helpful, okay, and good enough.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students are placed in this course. The highest package is mostly delivered to ST students, and the lowest package is mostly given to General students, which is not good in this college. Most students need equal respect. Most students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure, architecture, and overall quality are good enough. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are in decent good condition. Hostel quality is also decent good, and mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are also in goodwill and best.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Physics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and has a decent infrastructure and a healthy environment for studies.

content.Placements: My course is in B.Sc. Physics, in which we study the basics of physics and its applications. There are many career options and placements from the courses, and students can also go for higher studies in this field and can do a Ph.D. in the subject.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well decorated and has proper classes for each course with proper lab support for every subject. The college also supports Wi-Fi in each class and lab with proper connection. The library is also good. The toilets are also very clean and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college but needs improvement in faculty quality.

content.Placements: Average placement package ranges from 3 to 5.5 LPA, with around 70% of students placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. About 60% of students received internships at startups, TCS, and Cognizant, mainly in roles like SDE and Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers free Wi-Fi throughout the campus for academic use. The computer labs are well-furnished with modern systems and essential software. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards, promoting interactive learning.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physical Education and Sports (B.P.E.S) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: I pursued my Bachelor's degree from ICFAI University Tripura and I am happy to announce that I was the part of 1st batch of BPES. Other course offers placements but physical education doesn't have placements. No recruiting companies you have to try on your own as physical education is different from other courses. 100% of students got a chance to do the internship.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi across the campus. Labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The quality of the food is satisfactory of mess and canteen, medical facilities, and ambulance is present 24/7, for sports and games 1 multipurpose ground, 1 basketball ground, 2 badminton courts and gymnasium are also there.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA + MCA - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, good placement in 2024, and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Total 180 students get placed. The highest salary is 30 LPA. The lowest salary is 10 LPA offered in the course. Top companies are TCS, Wipro, Bandhan Bank, and HDFC Bank. All the students got internships, and there are few companies DIT, ASD, and Ardent. Top roles offered by Flipkart and Amazon. Top companies come every year and get placements for students. All the students got placements for few companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for the course are free Wi-Fi with new technologies based, practical labs with excellent features of classroom with smart board, excellent library with more stock in books. The quality of the hostel facilities is very good. Quality of food is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available 24 hours. Sports and games facilities are available.

admission_overview.college_name: ICFAI University Tripura Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process, Application, Dates

admission_process.title: ICFAI University Tripura Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: ICFAI University Tripura admission 2025is ongoing for regular as well as open & distance learning courses. The university offers several programmes at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels across the streams of Arts, Science, Education, Engineering, Computer Application, Law, and Business Administration. As the university also offers various distance learning courses, it is approved by the Distance Education Council (DEC).
ICFAI Univesity Tripura expected the last date to fill out the application form is expected to be in the month of August 2025. The course can help you

ICFAI University Tripura admission 2025 offers admission to several courses through common entrance examinations while admission to the rest of the other courses is done based on the marks obtained in the qualifying examinations followed by application screening and interview. Learn more about ICFAI University Tripura through the highlights table given below:
Read more:For more detailed informationClick here
Check out the below videos for more information:

ICFAI University Tripura decides the eligibility and selection criteria for the courses on offer. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set out by the university to apply for the courses. The selection criteria generally are merit-based, the candidates are shortlisted based on the details given on the application form and the interview round. Learn more aboutICFAI University Tripura coursesthrough the eligibility and selection table given below:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

The shortlisted candidates are eligible to pay theICFAI University Tripura feeand secure their spot in the desired course. The fee structure of ICFAI University courses has various components and the course fee varies with different courses. Check out the table below to learn more aboutICFAI University Tripura course fee:

The admission process for courses offered by ICFAI University Tripura can be merit-based or entrance-based. The candidates can check the admission process for specific courses on the official website of the university. The admission process requires candidates to fill out the application form with their correct details and upload their documents for verification. Learn more through the steps given below:
Step 1: ICFAI University Tripura Application Process 2025

Candidates must visit the official website of the university and fill out the application form with the asked-for details. The candidates must also upload the documents and mention their co-curriculums as these are the criteria to shortlist candidates based on their application form. The application form is available on the official website of the university for the admission session 2025.
Step 2: Interview round

A few courses requires candidates to appear for an interview round that is conducted by the university. The candidates are initially shortlisted based on their academics and their application form, these candidates are then called for the interview round. Candidates must clear the admission round to make it to the final shortlist.
Step 3: Paying the Course Fee

Candidates who have made it to the final shortlist are eligible to pay the course fee and secure their seat in the course they have applied for. The in-depth fee structure is mentioned on the official website of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, in this course, teachers are very helpful, okay, and good enough.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure, architecture, and overall quality are good enough. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are in decent good condition. Hostel quality is also decent good, and mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are also in goodwill and best.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and has a decent infrastructure and a healthy environment for studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well decorated and has proper classes for each course with proper lab support for every subject. The college also supports Wi-Fi in each class and lab with proper connection. The library is also good. The toilets are also very clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but needs improvement in faculty quality.
reviews.review_text: The college offers free Wi-Fi throughout the campus for academic use. The computer labs are well-furnished with modern systems and essential software. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards, promoting interactive learning.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi across the campus. Labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The quality of the food is satisfactory of mess and canteen, medical facilities, and ambulance is present 24/7, for sports and games 1 multipurpose ground, 1 basketball ground, 2 badminton courts and gymnasium are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, good placement in 2024, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the course are free Wi-Fi with new technologies based, practical labs with excellent features of classroom with smart board, excellent library with more stock in books. The quality of the hostel facilities is very good. Quality of food is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available 24 hours. Sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of The ICFAI University, Tripura.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. There are unlimited Wi-Fi and labs with proper equipment. Classrooms are well-equipped and the library is also good with a good number of books. The quality of food in our hostel mess is very poor. The canteen food is still good but the mess food is very worst. There are medical facilities on the campus. Every sport and game facilities are available here. The college encourages every sport and player.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides excellent teaching, and all faculty members are qualified.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure are sufficient. They provide great opportunities for new hobbies, skills, and group discussion programs that happen every day. Everything is clear and good; all the staff is friendly, but the hostels are not provided. However, hostels run by outsiders are located near the campus.

reviews.review_heading: They have their own transportation.
reviews.review_text: On college campus, Wi-Fi is available. All lab equipments is provided for practical experience. On campus, a central library is present. Classes are well maintained with 24X7 CCTV and smartboards. The food quality is also good in hostel. Medical facilities are available. They have their own ambulance. We have on campus park, gym, and every sports equipment present.

reviews.review_heading: True insights of The ICFAI University, Tripura.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms with smart boards and well-lit speakers. Library facilities are also great here. Hostel rooms are good but the mess food is just the worst. Quality and taste both are missing from the food. There are medical facilities on the campus. All types of sports are promoted on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: I’ll recommend this college, but not for B.Tech; otherwise, it’s good for placement and infrastructu
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides basic amenities including a bed, chair, desk, and wardrobe in each room. Students have access to dining facilities, a medical center, a gymnasium, and a canteen. The library and computer center have high-speed internet. Sports and games facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Decoding the true facts of The ICFAI University, Tripura.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are well-equipped classrooms, labs, a library, and unlimited Wi-Fi access in classrooms. The food quality in the hostel mess is the worst. There are medical facilities 24x7. Every sport and game facility is there in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the exam pattern, fee structure, and environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus and infrastructure were very good, a huge place with a beautiful garden, park, and playground. You got everything there, meal food, Wi-Fi, water, friends, and a library. It was a good value for money to take admission there. I personally suggested taking admission.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is good, facilities & infrastructure are best, but there is no elevator for students.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus has Wi-Fi facilities are there, and smartboard facilities are also there. Labs with AC, and PCs in labs are average. Washing machines, geysers, and Wi-Fi facilities are there in the hostel, and the price of the hostel is fair enough. But the best food is not very much good, it's average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ICFAI University, Tripura.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in our college is quite big and good. There is Wi-Fi 24/7 and well-air-conditioned labs, classrooms are big and hold 100 students. Hostel is good but the quality of food available in the mess is below average. Medical facilities are available inside the campus and all kinds of sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of The ICFAI University, Tripura.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available on our campus are good. Infrastructure is also good. There are Wi-Fi 24X7 and full air-conditioned labs. There is a library for all courses. Hostel is good and provides good facilities. The food in the mess is not good and tastes below average. There are more facilities like medical and sports of all kinds.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about The ICFAI University, Tripura

reviews_list.review_title: Al shifa offering top notch facilities and educational opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Al shifa college of pharmacy offers top placement opportunities. Al shifa has a placement cell that has connections to some of the top companies currently in the pharmaceutical industry field. Every year the final years of every course gets the opportunity to display their skills and knowledge in a campus placement drive a majority of the students do get campus placement with a good salary package ranging anywhere from. 7-12 Lacs. Some of the major roles offered by my course are clinical pharmacist, pharmacovigilance offices etc. Pharma.D students also get 1 year of mandatory internship at their 6 year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The placements are not so good but it is good for pursuing Bachelors.

review_content.Placements: The salary offered is between 10K to 20K per month. Students are placed in hospital during internship on the basis of how much knowledge we have about the treatment. The salary in the beginning is less but with experience it increases. Post the course, students can even open their own clinic or even hospital or work privately too. But since the salary is very low, I am opting for M.Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: Several fests are conducted all round the year. The library is just awesome, they have tons of referral books in the library. We have a hostel, which I would rate 8/10. Facilities and maintenance are good. Regular cleaning of washrooms and good furniture is also there.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the crowd, good placement, and good infrastructure and facilities

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed from our course. Depending upon where you are placed, I think in Kerala, the highest starting salary is Rs. 20,000. Apollo is one of the recruiting companies for this course. 99 percent of students got internships, I guess. Clinical pharmacist is the top role offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs, classrooms, library, and even a digital library are also available. I think the facilities are really good, the food is also very tasty, and they change the menu every month, and there is a mess meeting also. Medical facilities are also provided. There are various games and sports we can engage in at our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is good, you can enjoy college life and study at the same time.

content.Placements: Overall placement rate for undergraduate students is 85%. The average salary for B.Pharma graduates is 2.23 LPA. Top recruiting companies in Kerala include Sun Pharma, Ramco, and others. About 85% of students get an internship from the course and the college. After finishing the course, graduates can become a drug inspector, among other roles.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel at Al Shifa College of Pharmacy is very good. They provide good quality food with different meals every day. The rooms are good, very clean, and neat, with a lot of space. There are also good bathrooms and washrooms. The hostel has a medical room for its own use.

admission_process.title: Al Shifa College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Al Shifa College of Pharmacy admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels in stream includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Al Shifa College of Pharmacyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGPAT, KEAM, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 84,000 - 11,40,000for UG, PG and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the crowd, good placement, and good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, classrooms, library, and even a digital library are also available. I think the facilities are really good, the food is also very tasty, and they change the menu every month, and there is a mess meeting also. Medical facilities are also provided. There are various games and sports we can engage in at our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, you can enjoy college life and study at the same time.
reviews.review_text: Hostel at Al Shifa College of Pharmacy is very good. They provide good quality food with different meals every day. The rooms are good, very clean, and neat, with a lot of space. There are also good bathrooms and washrooms. The hostel has a medical room for its own use.

reviews.review_heading: Al shifa offering top notch facilities and educational opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college is surrounded by greenert giving a wonderful atmosphere for learning the college is equipped with many laboratories for various subjects equipped with top class equipment for a more practical learning. The classrooms are equipped with smart TV and projectors for modern learning. The hostel offers neat and clean rooms and offer any help needed for studies the mess provides a menu of both veg and non-veg and the food is of good quality. There are facilities and equipment for a variety ...

reviews.review_heading: The placements are not so good but it is good for pursuing Bachelors.
reviews.review_text: Several fests are conducted all round the year. The library is just awesome, they have tons of referral books in the library. We have a hostel, which I would rate 8/10. Facilities and maintenance are good. Regular cleaning of washrooms and good furniture is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good, and facilities, infrastructure and all things are also very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. In the hostel, there are refrigerators and other suitable things, which made everything very good.

reviews.review_heading: My college in my aspects.
reviews.review_text: The campus have laboratory, classroom, Library and animal house facilities. The hostel, college anf canteen is entirely good. The food is also good. Many programs are conducted for children sake. The teachers are very supportive for academic and other programmes.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with friendly faculty members, good internship recommendations and curriculum planning.
reviews.review_text:
Top facilities and infrastructure like wide and workable labs with full of equipments needed and Wi-Fi available campus. Available classrooms for every batch and best elaborated library with 2 librarians. 
Separate hostels for girls, boys, and staff of the college with a variety of foods and canteen. 
Ground for sports and court for badminton and football, cricket and auditorium for arts clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfaction regarding tough course to study of Pharma.D in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-designed infrastructure and technical expertise with quality lecturers. The downside of our campus is there isn't any canteen for the students. Wi-Fi is not enabled. Labs are well-equipped and documented. There are no better sports facilities like in other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studies and very strict.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course include a number of classrooms, a library, and free Wi-Fi on campus. There are labs for different departments, and in the hostel, there are 2 wardens for girls and one warden for boys. There is the main chief warden.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very clean and tidy. There are many facilities available. The library has tons of books related to studies and other topics. The canteen is okay but can be maintain some clean and give healthy food. There are clubs for games and sports. It is a free Wi-Fi enabled campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Utmost satisfaction with course and specially the faculty and Statistics also good .

review_content.Placements: Placements in medicine is not like other services. This place really brushes up your skill with amazing patient exposure. With this course you can be an ayurvedic doctor in charge and also medical officer. Government health sector would recruit you. For government placement the package is same usually. You get to do an compulsory internship year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for the course is amazing you will have everything and anything to fulfill your academic and curriculum related needs in college. Though the hostel isn't that nice food is good, but the place is crowded you will have all necessities here for sure but not in the best possible condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has peaceful surroundings.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides many job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides very good facilities. Smart classrooms are available in our college. Our college provides hostel facilities. The hostel provides food on time. We can practice sports on the ground. We have sports teachers. Our college has a large library. It has all books.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are very good. They are very knowledgeable and experienced. They are very responsible for each student. They are very supportive. The curriculum of this college is very useful to students to know about the course. It is not much difficult to pass exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of our faculty members, good atmosphere, student-friendly campus, etc.

review_content.Placements: Our course was for 5.5 years and our class strength was about 90 students. Ayurveda is a traditional medicine that developed about 2500 years ago, and the trend was that so many students were interested in this medical field. So our opportunities are increasing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college labs and classrooms were student-friendly. The library was very useful during my period.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members had completed BAMS in higher-quality colleges and had MDs in that particular department. So we could ask any question them, and surely they would assist us. Every month, we had exams, and every three months there would be internals. The pass percentage was 60%. Our faculty members were very supportive and pampered us during our course. They were our backbone.

content.Placements: My batch is 2021 B.A.M.S. I studied in a government college in Kerala and came from Bihar through the NEET examination. There is an internal quota and an All-India quota. An internship is provided after completing 4.5 years of study. One year compulsory internship is given with a monthly of Rs.23,000 provided by the Government of Kerala.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are in the main city, and the infrastructure is good, but it is similar to that of a normal government college. In the final year, you get a single room, so it is very nice for final-year students to live here. The monthly charge of the hostel is only Rs.250, and a mess is available.

reviews.review_heading: Utmost satisfaction with course and specially the faculty and Statistics also good .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for the course is amazing you will have everything and anything to fulfill your academic and curriculum related needs in college. Though the hostel isn't that nice food is good, but the place is crowded you will have all necessities here for sure but not in the best possible condition.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has peaceful surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities. Smart classrooms are available in our college. Our college provides hostel facilities. The hostel provides food on time. We can practice sports on the ground. We have sports teachers. Our college has a large library. It has all books.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of our faculty members, good atmosphere, student-friendly campus, etc.
reviews.review_text: Our college labs and classrooms were student-friendly. The library was very useful during my period.

reviews_list.review_title: Very good college comparatively for people searching for a good government college.

review_content.Placements: There's no placement in MBBS after graduation, finishing your internship. You have to write NEET PG to continue with MD or explore many other options available according to people's interests. During your internship, you'll get around 30,000, and during MD, around 50,000, which will increase over time. "Doctor" itself is the top role!
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very nice, with spacious classrooms and technical facilities like PPTs. The labs are well equipped comparatively. The library has a good amount of books to refer to. Overall, I feel the facilities are good compared to others.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with college, faculty, infrastructure, facilities, etc.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. It only gives us internship opportunities. They give us internships in their own government hospital in Madikeri of Kodagu district. 100% of students got internships from this course in the government hospital of Madikeri.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with beautiful weather. The faculty is well-qualified and experienced. In the college, we have a large library with lots of books. The quality of chief facilities in the hostel is the best, with good quality food available, and there is one canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Kodagu Institute of Medical Sciences, Kodagu.

review_content.Placements: We have just had a batch of passed out graduates, that is the batch of 2016, who have been pursuing their own path. A few of them have been posted to reputed places, whereas a few have opted to go for further studies. We don't have companies recruiting us like in other colleges, as it is a government medical college and things don't work the same way as in other courses. Internships are offered to everyone on a compulsory basis.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very modest, with only basic requirements fulfilled, sometimes not even that. Classrooms are filled with fungus-covered walls, and the washrooms have no water most of the time. There is no guarantee of electricity or water in this place. We do have Wi-Fi, but only limited to the digital library and the ground floor of the hostel. Labs are well-equipped and lit. The library is good, with a vast collection of books and flexible reading hours. The hostel rooms are fine. There are problems with water, electricity, and food. Sports and games are not encouraged, and there are no designated areas.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Hard work always pays off.

content.Placements: Actually, as I am studying in MBBS, we usually don't have placements. Instead, we have to work in our own hospital in the year of internship. The salary of an intern is 30,000 per month, so we will have a busy schedule as intern doctors. We will face many problems initially during the work. Almost all the students who pass the final year or 4th prof will work as interns.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good and clean. We have a well-built and spacious library which provides a good environment for studies. In the hostel, they provide us with a study table and chair for each room. Drinking water facilities are poor in the hostel, and there are no proper geysers in the rooms. The canteen's food is good but a little bit costlier compared to in town. No medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A college with good environment, moderate teaching, and a moderate social life.

content.Placements: MBBS course offers good placement opportunities. Even if a job is not available, we can build our careers. Our college provides excellent teaching and skill development, which helps us secure good jobs. College also offers PG courses. As junior doctors, we can earn a good salary.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, with the hostel located within the college campus. However, hospital is situated in the city center, which is 5 km away from the college. Hostel is well-maintained, with two members per room, and each room has a separate bathroom. Food in the hostel mess is also good.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Kodagu Institute of Medical Sciences, Kodagu MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26844 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 21900 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Kodagu Institute of Medical Sciences, Kodagu accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. Water comes only twice a day and electricity cuts occur every now and then. Washrooms are clean. The food is tasty with non-veg also served but it is quite oily and spicy.

reviews.review_heading: It is a comparatively good government college, with academics given the first preference.
reviews.review_text: We have many classrooms on our campus. There is a total of 3 blocks, where block A is filled with classrooms, and other blocks are dedicated to the subject-oriented classes and labs. Although the classes are big, we do have a regional-based problem, like fungus, as it is a hill station. We do have Wi-Fi available on our campus as well as in the hostel, although it is not fast at all. Labs are well-equipped and provided with the best staff. The library is also well-equipped, we have 1 library, a ...

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college in Madikeri.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the ground floor of the hostel and in A block. The library and study room are available. There is Nandini parlour and DCC. An oxygen plant is installed, and the college is good. You can spend your time very nicely, and there is a good drinking water facility.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kodagu Institute of Medical Sciences, Kodagu.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. It provides the best facilities. The quality of food served in a mess and canteen is good. Sports equipment is also available. It has a gym. Sports like kabbadi, kho-kho, volleyball, and cricket are played in our college. Libraries are spacious.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing place to study and shape your career.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the college are very good and the building itself is an art of architecture. Its marvelous location is what we all love as it is located don the top of the district and it gives us the whole view of the district, and at night the view and the climate are wonderful.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good campus, and very good medical college life can be expected.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very good in the hostel, and seniors are very helpful. There are lots of sports and other activities. The canteen is available on the campus. Sports day is conducted once a year. There is a different library, study hall, a volleyball court and a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Located in really good landscape of kodagu. Very supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college building contain 3 blocks. Containing various pre clinical departments. Hospital and other departments 2 km away from college at town. Boys and girls hostel are near to college. 6 floor,  2 members each in one room, attached bathroom. Mess is available in hostel itself. Besides 2 more buildings are there for faculty members and PG residents. As our college and hostels are located on Hill top, scenary from here is awesome. Will give a fresh mind to study.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with cool weather. It is a perfect place to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was renovated. The new building had all the good audio-visual aids. Labs were furnished with all the latest microscopes and instruments. Classrooms are very spacious and are built as a gallery. The new building of the hostel is provided with well-sized rooms and better facilities. The food served in a mess should have more varieties.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities, including a digital library, labs and classrooms. There are very minimal extracurricular activities such as arts, sports etc. The college doesn't focus on these activities. The hostels are not that great. Water timings are implemented, and there are frequent water shortages. The food is also not that great.

reviews.review_heading: Never take admission in this medical college.
reviews.review_text: Horrible. Diarrheal disease is rampant due to hygienic mess food. Hostel full of fungus over crowding. No Wi-Fi facility. No proper electricity or water in hostel. Very difficult to focus and study. Location of hostel is not good. Unsafe for women so they don't allow girls to go out from hostel as no security in campus.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college and top-most pharmacy college in Hyderabad. Best facilities and teachers are friendly.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities for Pharma.D students are steadily growing. The college has strong ties with hospitals, pharmaceutical companies, clinical research organisations, and healthcare startups. Students have been placed in roles such as clinical pharmacists, medical writers, pharmacovigilance associates, clinical research coordinators, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for Pharma.D program at St Pauls College of Pharmacy is excellent. This campus provides state-of-the-art laboratories equipped with modern infrastructure for pharmacy labs. Classrooms are spacious well ventilated and integrated with smart learning tools. The library is rich with updated pharmacy textbooks and journals and access to online databases essential for clinical research. The hospital tie-ups (KIMS Hospital) for clinical training offer real-time patient care experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty teaching. Good in lab work. Good in project works. Sports, games, events.

content.Placements: I got an overall percentage in B Pharmacy of 7.15%. I want to get a job with a package of 24000. I am working in Zuventus company. I got an internship in with 80%. I got a job as a Medical representative. I passed with a good percentage. My batchmates are very active and friendly. I miss those persons.
content.Infrastructure: In my college days, I stayed in a hostel. In that hostel, it was very clean and neat. Food is very good. Facilities are very good. Maintenance is clean and neat. Wi-Fi facility is also available. The rent was 4500. In that course, I learned new things. And I learned how to operate lab equipment.

individual_reviews.title: Completely satisfied by college's infrastructure and the faculty is supportive and experienced.

The college will provide internship and industrial training and also industrial visits. The college will also conduct an international conference every year make us to participate.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are good, and all the equipment is provided by the college. No hostel facility but the classrooms are neat and clean. The library is provided by the college with many books. The computer lab and mentor class will be there in the college.

individual_reviews.title: Excellent college for Pharma aspirants .

content.Placements: Many of the students will get a job in Camus placements. The faculty supports every student and encourage them to give an interview. Many tips most companies will offer a job in our college. Jobs in QA (quality assurance), QC (quality control), and production departments are.

It also has a library and a seminar hall for easy, and analysis of projects.

reviews.review_heading: I would suggest it is a good college in Hyderabad to take admission.
reviews.review_text: We have all facilities in college like Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, and canteen, and the quality-wise, it is perfect. It is used to clean every day, wisely to maintain the hygiene and decorum of the college premises. The management behaves well with the parents who come to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Very good environment and best place to study.

Classrooms are big and comfortable to sit in, and the college environment is very good with green areas all around. The hostels are a very good place to stay, and the food provided is also tasty. I suggest people take admission in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment . Best faculity

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided satisfactory facilities and infrastructure for our course. The infrastructure of labs, classrooms, and a library is satisfactory. The quality of facilities in the canteen, medical, sports, and games was good. There was no hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is in a large area in this village. It has a free Wi-Fi facility, clean labs, big classrooms, a library with huge books, a playground, and all indoor and outdoor games. Hostel is not available in our college. Students stay in private hostels. Canteen is good and serves tasty food.

college_info.intro:
Siliguri Institute of Technology popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are taught various skills in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and various other fields. The BTech curriculum is updated from time to time to match the industry standards. The college has a well-maintained lab system for BTech students. The Department of Computer Science & Engineering in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) has 6 laboratories for students.
Siliguri Institute of Technology's MBA students have worked as interns in top companies such as IDBI Bank, Virtual Interactive Solutions Pvt Ltd, India Post Payment Bank, and others. There is a student club for MBA students. The college arranges various events for Management students such as Case Study competitions for Management students, Intra-college departmental club debate, and others. review_content.General: Our college has decent Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have air-conditioning system. Few of the labs have air conditioning but they don't work. Library books are old and outdated, and not in accordance with the latest syllabus. Even the library does not have air conditioning. Canteen is very unclean, and unhealthy foods are served. Speaking of medical services, they don't have any medicine on standby for emergencies. Sports and games consist mostly of indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2024, really good campus, and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: In the year 2024, a 92 % placement record was seen with an average CTC of 6 LPA and a median of 5 LPA. 51 LPA was the highest CTC acquired that year and the highest ever by Microsoft ( off campus ). 24 LPA was the highest CTC acquired on campus. For 25 years, SIT has been providing jobs to students, and they have done it really well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides us with a lush green campus and excellent infrastructure. Air conditioning is provided in all the labs with all the equipment in fine condition. review_summary.college_name: Siliguri Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college circumstances are very good.

content.Placements: Almost 80% were placed in our college, our college placement percentage is decent. The highest package offered is 51 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. TCS, Microsoft, and Amazon are the recruiting companies of our college. An internship is available in our college.
content.Infrastructure: College Wi-Fi are very strong, labs are very good, classrooms are clean, the library is very peaceful, and there are many books. The mess canteen is really good and clean. There were medical facilities, and many kinds of sports are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average faculty members, good placements in 2024, average infrastructure, and disgusting canteen.

content.Placements: The highest package is 52 LPA by Microsoft. It is an off campus placement. TCS hires students almost every year with an average package of 6 LPA, I suppose. Top recruiting companies include Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Wipro, Cognizant, Infosys, Capgemini, and HCL Technologies. Overall placement is 80% guaranteed. Best role offered is data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have air-conditioning system. Few of the labs have air conditioning but they don't work. Library books are old and outdated, and not in accordance with the latest syllabus. Even the library does not have air conditioning. Canteen is very unclean, and unhealthy foods are served. Speaking of medical services, they don't have any medicine on standby for emergencies. Sports and games consist mostly of indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2024, really good campus, and good faculty.

content.Placements: In the year 2024, a 92 % placement record was seen with an average CTC of 6 LPA and a median of 5 LPA. 51 LPA was the highest CTC acquired that year and the highest ever by Microsoft ( off campus ). 24 LPA was the highest CTC acquired on campus. For 25 years, SIT has been providing jobs to students, and they have done it really well.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides us with a lush green campus and excellent infrastructure. Air conditioning is provided in all the labs with all the equipment in fine condition. The college has one central library and a digital library. Wi-Fi is available all over campus. Cheap and good quality food is found in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied and placements are average.

content.Placements: 20 percent of students from the course is taken in placements and from there around 60 to 70 percent students are placed, the average package of this course in our college was around 8lpa, and the minimum was around 2 to 3lpa, and the highest package someone got was 51lpa, Top recruiters in our college include Capgemini, TCS, Infosys, Virtusa, and Wipro, with Microsoft, Bosch, Amazon, and etc. Companies, around 70 per cent of students get internships from the college, some get in ICL, TCS, Wipro, etc., top roles are senior software engineer, Data scientist.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good, and if you grind, you will achieve.

content.Placements: I am very happy pursuing my course, and 90% of students are placed in my college. Many packages are offered by the college, like the highest package I heard about is 51 LPA, and the lowest I think is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are TCS. About 70 to 80% are eligible for internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and course are very good, like the Wi-Fi and the labs, which are very good. The classrooms and library are very clean, and the medical facilities are one of the good things in our college. There is a wide ground for sports and games, and there are various games in our college. They also provide a gym.

admission_overview.title: SIT Siliguri Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: SIT Siliguri admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The institute offers various courses at the UG and PG levels along with multiple specialisations. These include- BTech, BBA, BCA, MBA, MTech, etc. The institute also offers Diploma courses to candidates. SIT Siliguri is affiliated with Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT), WBSCT, VE, and SD. It accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as MAT, JEMAT, WBJEE, etc., for admission. The mode of application for all the courses at SIT Siliguri is online.

admission_process.title: SIT Siliguri Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SIT Siliguriadmissions 2025are entrance and merit-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process to take admission in the institute. Find below the detailed process aroundSIT Siliguri admissions 2025:
Step 1: SIT Siliguri Application Process 2025

The SIT Siliguri application process is conducted in online as well as offline modes. Candidates have to apply through the counseling bodies' websites of respective courses by using basic details such as personal and educational qualifications. Along with that, they have to pay an application fee for the respective course.
Step 2: SIT Siliguri Selection Rounds 2025

After filling out the application form, candidates have to appear for the respective entrance exam for the SIT Siliguri course admissions. The shortlisted candidates have to appear for further counseling rounds for the respective courses. The institute might conduct PI round for a few courses.
Step 3: SIT Siliguri Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, shortlisted candidates as per the merit lists will get admission to the respective courses. Students who get their names on the merit list are then requested to visit the institute for reporting, upload documents, and pay theSIT Siliguri feeto confirm their seats.

reviews.review_text: Our college has decent Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have air-conditioning system. Few of the labs have air conditioning but they don't work. Library books are old and outdated, and not in accordance with the latest syllabus. Even the library does not have air conditioning. Canteen is very unclean, and unhealthy foods are served. Speaking of medical services, they don't have any medicine on standby for emergencies. Sports and games consist mostly of indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024, really good campus, and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college provides us with a lush green campus and excellent infrastructure. Air conditioning is provided in all the labs with all the equipment in fine condition. The college has one central library and a digital library. Wi-Fi is available all over campus. Cheap and good quality food is found in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough for engineering, the campus is quite big enough, there are medical facilities, there's a basketball court with a gallery and a football ground big enough, the food in the canteen is average and price is also decent like a veg thali with price dal and 2 sabji cost 45 rs with extra price to be 5 rs per serve. There's a small gym, very small though, and sports and games are fine, like tournaments, etc. Happens once a year.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good, and if you grind, you will achieve.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and course are very good, like the Wi-Fi and the labs, which are very good. The classrooms and library are very clean, and the medical facilities are one of the good things in our college. There is a wide ground for sports and games, and there are various games in our college. They also provide a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with supportive faculty members and decent campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: BCA department at SIT has good facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library with digital resources. Hostels are decent for first-year students with basic amenities, though many shift to PGs later. Mess and canteen provide hygienic food, medical facilities are available on campus, and students can enjoy both indoor and outdoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is peaceful with decent placements. Needs a stronger industry connection.
reviews.review_text: Green-campus college with solid faculty and placements. Wi-fi is available in all the departments. SIT has a central library. SIT has a huge campus area and a well-maintained infrastructure. College has a large playground, basketball court, games rooms, gym, indoor badminton court & volleyball court. Campus area is plastic-free.

reviews.review_heading: No private college is good until you work hard and pursue your dreams.
reviews.review_text: When we were in 1st year of college, they provided us with a well-maintained classroom with 3 AC, which was good. When we entered the 2nd year, we were provided another classroom without AC. College Wi-Fi is really useless; it doesn't work. Classroom and lab are quite good. College canteen food is not good, so most students eat from outside.

reviews.review_heading: All you need to know about SIT.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide hostel facilities, but there are several good PGs and rented apartments available nearby, the college. They also provide 3 meals a day and free Wi-Fi. Talking about the college lab infrastructure, it is sufficiently good. Labs are clean, and desktops are well-managed.

reviews.review_heading: If have a problem with money and want a good college then you can consider it otherwise just don't.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is below average the college campus is too small. Wi-Fi is the worst and even the mobile network doesn't work properly on the campus. Classrooms are okay but the board is very cheap smartlab is also very old. There are no hostel facilities here you have to stay in PG which is widely available around the college. Canteens are good they provide good quality meals at very low prices. Don't expect too much from the sports department it is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in North Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is weak. Labs are well-equipped. The library is well-maintained. Canteens have delicious food. Classrooms are large and clean. The infrastructure is good. Our college does not offer hostel facilities but we have many PGs, apartments, and rooms near our college.

reviews.review_heading: SIT- A hidden gem in the lap of North Bengal.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities in our college. During COVID-19, hostel facilities of our college are topped. Coming to the part of facilities and infrastructure of our course. For B.Tech, there is a main building and a desh building which is generally known as 1st year building. Each building has separate Wi-Fi services on separate floors so that no one could face connectivity issues. They are a basic electrical engineering lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, drawing hall, and AutoCAD room in 1st y...

reviews.review_heading: The Siliguri Institute of Technology – The college campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: Moreover, the vibrant campus life adds value, with a variety of extracurricular activities, clubs, and events that encourage students to explore their interests, build networks, and create lasting memories. These factors together contribute to a fulfilling college experience.

reviews.review_heading: An Engineering college in Siliguri .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough to hold various students, including Wi-Fi facilities, which are also good enough. The department's labs and classrooms provided by the college are excellent. Also, the ground present in the college is big enough to hold various matches of cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the college faculty and their placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members of my college are very helpful. The infrastructure of the college is well designed. The labs and classrooms are also clean and clear. The library of our college is very beautiful. There are so many books to read. But sometimes the Wi-Fi connection of the college is very poor. There is so much good quality food in our college canteen and the medical facilities are very good. We play a lot of sports and games in our college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Siliguri Institute of Technology

likes.text: In our college, top companies like TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant, ZS Associates, etc., visit the campus for recruitment.
The training and placement cell is completely involved in tying up with companies in order to provide best opportunities for the students at hand.

In our college, the rooms are very good with proper Wi-Fi facility and also other things.

likes.text: They will help you out regarding anything, and every teacher is well qualified from reputed universities.
The course curriculum is quite relevant which helps students to understand any topic taught, in a much easier way.

faqs.answer: A:    MATS University offers admission based on merit and valid entrance exam scores. Therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 to seek admission at UG level courses. Whereas, for PG level courses, candidates must secure valid scores in graduation.Moreover, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, LSAT, CAT, XAT, MAT, GATE and others. review_summary.college_name: MATS University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I don't think this college is good for people.

content.Placements: The percentage of students getting placed is very low. They usually get placement in private companies, but the college's role in bringing those placements is very low. People usually do this course and get placed. In college, I have seen people from other batches getting jobs with the exception. The average package in my course is that students got jobs in private schools, with a salary of Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 20,000. I hardly know anything about the companies. Nobody got a company placement from the college, and nobody got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is for name sake, it is for attracting students who are not willing to study but are just coming to have a degree in their name. My friend was thrown out of the hostel. The next exam was over without notifying the students beforehand.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad infrastructure, micro management, and poor facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are non-existent and mostly are to NGOs, giving like 2LPA offers max. This college is a no-go for placements. 10% of my seniors have been placed, and it was miserable. Most of them didn't even care to join, but we were made to sit in placements as they made it mandatory.
content.Infrastructure: I don't live in the hostel as I am a day scholar, but I have heard from my classmates and seniors that they have big hall dorms where they have laid out like 15 bedsheets and you have to sleep like that, no personal rooms or such, and even have to share your bathroom. Just don't choose it.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are top class. We have a huge campus with each and every kind of facility available. There are separate buildings for each department. Practical laboratories are well built and equipped with all the necessary facilities. Hostels are clean and hygienic. The mess is huge.
