admission_process.title: MATS University Raipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahaveer Academy of Technology and Science University (MATS University) offers 40 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses across 12 different schools in the disciplines of Engineering & Technology, Management, Law, Fashion Design, Arts, Education, Sciences, Business Studies, Library Science & Physical Education.MATS Universityis approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and the All India Council of Technical Education (AICTE). The mode of application for all courses is online, and admission is bothmerit-basedandentrance exam-based. Apart from regular degree courses, the university also extends UG, PG, certificate, and diploma courses through distance education.Check details here.

MATS University Raipur offers merit-based admission to various UG, PG, and doctoral courses; however, the university also accepts the scores of several entrance exams for courses like BTech, MBA, MTech, and MCA. Listed in the table below are MATS University courses along with entrance exams accepted for respective admissions at the university:

For MATS University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to MATS University course admissions 2025:

MATS University admissions 2025 provide both merit and entrance-based criteria.Applicants have to navigate their way through all stages of the selection procedure to be admitted.The following is an outline of the 2025 MATS University admission process:
Step 1: MATS University Application Process 2025

The MATS University admission process 2025 starts with the application stage.Application forms can be obtained from the university's website. The form may be mailed by post or handed over to the concerned department at MATS University. Payment for the application and entrance test can be made through an online process and candidates have to attach two photocopies of online bank challan with the pay slip to the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The UG, PG, and doctoral admissions are based on merit and an entrance exam.For BTech, scores from the entrance test JEE Main are used, while for MBA admission, scores from CAT, XAT, MAT, or any other similar management test are required. For MTech, a GATE score is required while in case of LL.M, a recognised law entrance exam or LSAT has to be cleared.B.Ed requires clearance of the university's entrance test by the candidate.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing the selection process, candidates need to participate in counselling for the particular course for which they are shortlisted. The merit list will be released in multiple rounds by MATS University. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the admission fee within the provided time period in order to secure their seats.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for MBA admission at MATS University?
faqs.answer: The MATS University accepts the CAT, XAT, MAT, and other equivalent management entrance exams for MBA admission. Candidates are shortlisted based on the scores obtained in the accepted entrance exam, followed by the counselling round. Additionally, prospective candidates must ensure they fulfill the eligibility criteria. Those who are shortlisted are required to pay the applicable course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What are the sectional CAT percentile cutoffs required for MBA admission at MATS University?
faqs.answer: Sectional CAT percentile cut-offs for admission to the MBA programme at MATS University are a minimum of 40 per section, which includes Quantitative Ability (Quants), Verbal Ability and Reading Comprehension (VA-RC), and Data Interpretation and Logical Reasoning (DI-LR). The same has been followed for the years 2022,  2023, and 2024, along with an overall cut-off of 70 percentile in the General-All India category. Achieving these cut-offs at the sectional level is necessary for aspirants to beco

faqs.question: Is the MBA admission open at MATS University?
faqs.answer: Yes, currently, MATS University is accepting admissions for the MBA programme for the academic year 2025. Interested candidates are required to visit MATS's official website to complete the application process before the stipulated deadline. Moreover, prospective candidates must ensure they fulfill the requisite eligibility criteria before applying for the programme. To stay updated on upcoming events, candidates are advised to frequently visit the university's official website.

faqs.question: What is the overall CAT percentile cutoff for MBA admission at MATS University?
faqs.answer: The general CAT percentile cut-off for MBA admission at MATS University has been the same at 70 for the General-All India category for the years 2022,  2023, and 2024. The cut-off represents the institution's uniform eligibility standard for its MBA course to ensure that the applicants demonstrate a comparable level of aptitude in the Common Admission Test (CAT) to gain admission.

hostel.description: The university provides the facility in the hostel like a well-furnished room, Continuous purified normal/cold drinking water, washing machine, first aid, two wheeler parking, newspaper, common room with TV, kitchenette, 24 hours medical facility, ATM, and facilitate shopping and outing on weekends.

library.description: The library which started from just a single room in 2008, is now spread over two campus - the MATS main campus and City campus. The library endeavors to facilitate the students, faculty, and researcher in their research pursuits and study purpose. The library has the collection about 35000 documents in, which include books, journals, theses. It has access to about 110 international and national journal.  In addition, MATS staff and students have access to e Shodh Sindhu, Manupatra, Lexis India, DELNET. MATS Library has always maintained an up-to-date library. The library also provides reprography facility.

reviews.review_heading: I don't think this college is good for people.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is for name sake, it is for attracting students who are not willing to study but are just coming to have a degree in their name. My friend was thrown out of the hostel. The next exam was over without notifying the students beforehand.

reviews.review_heading: Bad infrastructure, micro management, and poor facilities.
reviews.review_text: I don't live in the hostel as I am a day scholar, but I have heard from my classmates and seniors that they have big hall dorms where they have laid out like 15 bedsheets and you have to sleep like that, no personal rooms or such, and even have to share your bathroom. Just don't choose it.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college life and campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are top class. We have a huge campus with each and every kind of facility available. There are separate buildings for each department. Practical laboratories are well built and equipped with all the necessary facilities. Hostels are clean and hygienic. The mess is huge.

reviews.review_heading: College has a very good faculty.
reviews.review_text: MATS University has a well developed infrastructure. There are sports and medical facilities available in the college. College has a canteen with the all types of fast foods available. College has Wi-Fi which can be accessed by the students. College has no hostel facility available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our college has a library. It provides issued books. We have a canteen. All classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: Sejal Gupta ( CA student ) B.Com
reviews.review_text: The structure is very average according to me. There is no specific ground or campus roaming area available. The structure a classes are highly great. There is free Wi-Fi available and library is full of various books, notes and sample projects. I don't know much able the hostel facilities so far I heard from my hotel friends - the facilities are not bad good, the food is okay-okay just the food of the hostels is excepted to be. But the medical care available is very supportive. We do have a spo...

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure and teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a crucial aspect of any university. Our university was no exception when I was studying there. The infrastructure was considered normal, but it provided all the necessary facilities and resources that a student needed to excel in their studies. The campus had modern buildings and well-equipped classrooms with interactive whiteboards, projectors, and sound systems. The university had a vast library that was filled with books. Our university had a well-equipped computer lab with ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of MATS University.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the building. Classrooms are well-structured. There are separate rooms for laboratory, design, engineering, etc. Many books are available in the library. Academic books are also provided. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities. But I have heard from friends that the hostels are good. The hostel fee is also affordable. Mess is available. It also has an emergency room. Sports are also conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is exhilarating and there are multiple technical events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college then it's good enough to satisfy you. All types of necessities you'll find on campus. Some classes have air-conditioners but mostly don't. You will get a huge library, playground, and most sports are available but there's no hostel facility available. You will get Wi-Fi on the whole campus and the quality is also good. The conditions of the college are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university include air-conditioned and fully-furnished classrooms. The Wi-Fi zones are also created by the university. The library is full of informative and useful books, and all the related books are available at the library. The hostel is very good. The food offered at the hostel is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. There are hostels with separate wings for girls and boys. The quality of the mess is also good. There are good classrooms equipped with projectors. The library has all the books that will help us in our studies. The college has renovated hostels, medical support systems with a physiotherapy center, a modern gymnasium, a swimming pool, and a huge parking facility. Computer labs, a media lab, and a resource center comprise the physical IT infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the classrooms, knowledgeable faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, but it has a lot of facilities which are good like free Wi-Fi, a library, neat classrooms and labs. I am a day scholar, so I have no idea how does the food at the hostel taste. There is no mess or canteen in our college. Sports facilities are good here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MATS University.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure, MATS Unversity was not big but we had a lot of fun there. The campus was good. The hostel was quite good during our course duration. But the food served was worse.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides all the facilities which we need. Classrooms are adequate, and smart classrooms are also available here. Almost all the books are available in the library. Labs are well-defined, and lab attendants were available to help us in every step of our practicals. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with out well qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with AC. Digital classroom is also available. We can get so many useful books from the library regarding our courses. Wi-Fi is also available in our college. We could go for online studies also in the college. Sports is the most important part of our college.

college_info.college_name: MATS University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: MATS University offers scholarships to deserving students to support their education. Students who wish to enroll in any course at MATS University will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that the MATS University has chosen to avail the scholarship.
MATS University will concession fees based on marks scored in the qualifying exams.

MATS University offers Chancellors Scholarships to students which are purely based on the student's performance in the qualifying exam exams. A student who has scored brilliantly in Class 12 or Graduation can take advantage of this scholarship program. The scholarships are provided for first-year students only. The below-mentioned are MATS University scholarships details:
Scholarship Name
Eligibility or Criteria for Selection
Amount of Scholarship
Chancellors Scholarships
The candidate must score more than 70% marks in the last qualifying examination
10% of total fee of the year
Chancellors Scholarships
The candidate must score more than 80% marks in the last qualifying examination
20% of total fee of the year
Chancellors Scholarships
The candidate must score more than 90% marks in the last qualifying examination
30% of total fee of the year

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at SNDT Women's University include MSc, BEd, MBA, PG Diploma and MA among others. individual_reviews.title: SNDT College of home science.

content.Placements: This college does not provide placements at all. It provides internships but not placements. content.Infrastructure: My course is in Nutrition and Dietetics, and it is an interesting course. Our college has a very big campus, and the only hostel is there. We have a library, and it's too big and can get any type of book there. The college also has a gym, and classrooms are also big.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: SNDT College provides placement opportunities to B.Com students. Around 30% of the students get placed in our college. Average package offered in the college was between 2-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were HDFC, Bajaj Finance, Finastra, Hitachi, etc. Top roles offered were in accounts, technical support, sales, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available for the B.Com course at SNDT college. Facilities offered in our college were of good quality. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, mess etc. were available for the students. Mess and canteen food was good to eat. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

We have to do an internship for our final year, and we all got internships in very reputed companies and boutiques, which gave us a very good experience. We were mostly offered jobs in the textile industry.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of SNDT College is very good. Wi-Fi, a well-equipped laboratory, a classroom with a good atmosphere, a very good library, and good washrooms and toilets are there. Hostel facilities are very good, and the quality is also good. individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The teaching quality and learning experience here are good.

content.Placements: The average package offered for my course was Rs 3 LPA. The highest package was 5 LPA. The top recruiters are hospitals and private clinics. Almost 70% of the batch opted for internships during the second year. Almost 60 to 70% of students get placed on campus. The campus placement cell is handled by the students and is very active.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is wonderful, and the classrooms are good with projectors. The college environment is good for sports activities. There is also a first-aid kit available. The canteen is well maintained. The library also has an updated collection of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Textile Science and Fashion Apparel Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college was very good. I love my college.

content.Placements: More than 50% of students got placed from our college. Top roles offered in my course included apparel designer, textile engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and the library were the best and clean. There was no canteen in the college. Medical facilities were also good. The hostel was very safe and clean, the food was nice, and the Wi-Fi connection was very fast. My college always participated in various types of sports and games at the national level. The college was very peaceful and beautiful, with lots of greenery.

admission_process.title: SNDT Women's University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SNDT Women's University admissionis a mix of both merit and entrance-based. The university provides an extensive range of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Technology, Education, Arts, Science, Computer Science, and more.SNDT Women's Universityadmission and application process commences online. The university offers courses in full-time and part-time (classroom) mode over 15 courses. Some of the popular programmes of SNDT Women's University are MSc, BEd, MBA, PG Diploma, and MA among others. The university accepts a valid score from several national and state-level entrance exams to shortlist the students. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and more for the university.

SNDT Pune course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. A student (from SNDT Pune or any other University) cannot get readmission into the BA second or BA third year after four years of break. This applies to all courses which belong to the Faculty of Humanities, Commerce and Management, Interdisciplinary Studies, Science and Technology. The table below showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularSNDT Women's University courses:
Admission Test + Personal Interview

The admission process will consist of a personal interview on the dates that will be communicated over email.

SNDT Women’s University feeincludes multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Once selected, candidates are required to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The fee may vary depending on the programme and specialisation selected by the students. Interested candidates can look at the following table to know about the course-wiseSNDT Women's University fees:
This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SNDT Women’s University seat intake variescourse-wise. The university offers a limited number of seats for its prorgammes. For getting a seat at the university, candidates are required need to meet the last educational qualification. Find below SNDT Pune seat intake for top courses:
This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SNDT Pune admission processincludes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Candidates must meet the admission criteria as specified by the university's guidelines to be eligible for admission at the university. Interested students can follow the below steps to get a seat atSNDT University Pune:
STEP 1: SNDT Women's University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
SNDT Pune shortlists candidates based on merit. However, the university also conducts Personal Interviews for MVA courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seats in the university. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat at the university.

placement_data.title: SNDT Women's University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to SNDT Women's University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.61 LPA , INR 4.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.7 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 335 UG and 328 PG students were placed during SNDT Women's University placements in 2022. The median package offered to UG students ranges between INR 1.2 LPA and INR 6 LPA. Further, the median package offered to PG students ranges between INR 4.32 LPA and INR 5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women's University, Churchgate- Pune?
faqs.answer: Almost 40-50% of MBA students get on-campus placements at Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women’s University (SNDTWU), Churchgate Campus, Mumbai. Companies like TCS and Wipro visit the campus for placements. The average package offered is 2-3 LPA. SNDTWU also has a placement cell that provides training and placement opportunities to students The median placement rate for undergraduate (UG) students in 2022 was 66%, and the median placement rate for postgraduate (PG) students was 85%, with UG students receiving a median package of INR 5,40 LPA and PG students receiving packages of INR 4,32 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: SNDT College of home science.
reviews.review_text: My course is in Nutrition and Dietetics, and it is an interesting course. Our college has a very big campus, and the only hostel is there. We have a library, and it's too big and can get any type of book there. The college also has a gym, and classrooms are also big.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available for the B.Com course at SNDT college. Facilities offered in our college were of good quality. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, mess etc. were available for the students. Mess and canteen food was good to eat. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good teaching quality.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of SNDT College is very good. Wi-Fi, a well-equipped laboratory, a classroom with a good atmosphere, a very good library, and good washrooms and toilets are there.
Hostel facilities are very good, and the quality is also good.
Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching quality and learning experience here are good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is wonderful, and the classrooms are good with projectors. The college environment is good for sports activities. There is also a first-aid kit available. The canteen is well maintained. The library also has an updated collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: The college was very good. I love my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library were the best and clean. There was no canteen in the college. Medical facilities were also good. The hostel was very safe and clean, the food was nice, and the Wi-Fi connection was very fast. My college always participated in various types of sports and games at the national level. The college was very peaceful and beautiful, with lots of greenery.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by S.N.D.T. College of EducationReviewed on 7 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is a better option.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities available like high-speed internet Wi-Fi, clean and hygienic labs, classrooms, a library and a laboratory. Sports facilities and grounds are available. Canteen, digital study material, good quality food and medical facilities are available in this college as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SNDT Women's University, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure, 2 libraries, good and fast Wi-Fi, 2 canteens and also medical facilities. Hostels were not good, and the quality of food was not that good. Sports and games like badminton, volleyball, girls' football, etc., were provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SNDT Mumbai College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for my course include Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, and labs. The quality of the food is not as good compared to other colleges, but the medical facility is nice. We also have sports and games facilities, with monthly and weekly tournaments for students who want to play.

faqs.answer: A:    CDLU follows a seat reservation policy as per the guidelines of Haryana government. The reservation policy is as follows:15% of the seats shall be open/unreserved and will be filled through All India Quota (AIQ) (including Haryana). Out of the 15%  AIQ seats,  10% will be reserved for Economically Weaker Section (EWS)Remaining 85% seats are reserved for bona fide residents of Haryana (State Quota) and will be filled up asdetailed below:i) Haryana Open General Open Category (HOGC) - 40% of the State Quotaii) Reserved category of Haryana - 60% of the State Quotaiii) Scheduled Caste (SC) - 20% of State quotaiv) Backward Classes of Haryana (A) (BCA) - 16% of State quotav) Backward Classes of Haryana (B) (BCB) - 11% of State quotavi) Economically Weaker Section (EWS) - 10% of State quotavii) Differently Abled Persons / Divyang - 3% of State quota
faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy followed at CDLU?

faqs.answer: A:    Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) offers MBA programs through three entrance exams: CAT (Common Admission Test), CMAT (Common Management Aptitude Test), UET (University Entrance Test), and GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test). The CAT is the most widely accepted entrance exam for MBA programs in India, with minimum cut-offs varying depending on the programme and specialization. CMAT is another national-level MBA entrance exam accepted by several universities, with minimum cut-offs varying for specific programs. CDLU conducts its own UET for certain MBA programs and specializations, with minimum UET score cut-offs determined by CDLU for each programme and specialization. GMAT scores may be considered alongside other entrance exam scores or during the selection process. Other factors like academic merit and work experience can also influence the selection process. For detailed information on acceptable entrance exams, minimum score cut-offs, and admission criteria, visit the CDLU website's Admission page or individual programme brochures. It is important to consult the latest official information from CDLU to stay updated on the admission process for your desired program.

faqs.answer: A:    In case a candidate decides to withdraw his/her admission in a particular programme offered at CDLU, the following fee refund conditions will apply: (i) If a candidate leaves any programme, the entire fee deposited by the candidate will be refunded upto September 30 after deducting processing fee of INR 1000 (ii) If the admission of a student is cancelled by the college, for no fault of his/her, the duespaid by him/her will be refunded (iii) Caution money/Security Deposit is refundable if application is received by December 31 of the year of the completion of course.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of University College, Sirsa.

review_content.Placements: I was a student at one of the colleges in CDLU, Sirsa. It is a government college. There was a separate placement cell that organized placement from time to time. There are no companies in the city where I live but there are private banks that provide opportunities to students. The placement rate is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Unlike other government colleges, which often lack proper labs or computers, this college offers a good environment for students, including a computer lab with air conditioning and a spoken English lab where you can earn a free certificate. I was not a hostel student, but a friend of mine lived there. According to her, the hostel felt like a home, with well-maintained rooms, hygienic food, and extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. (Honrs). - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college offers good infrastructure but no placement support is available.

review_content.Placements: The college does not offer placement assistance for undergraduate programs. As a result, there are currently no placement opportunities available within the department. Students are, therefore, expected to explore off-campus job opportunities. The institution also does not conduct regular placement drives. Occasionally, a company may visit once a year, but such opportunities are limited in scope.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers top-quality infrastructure, including well-maintained facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer laboratories, a canteen, and a library. These amenities are efficient and support students' academic needs effectively. The hostel facilities are also commendable, both in terms of infrastructure and the quality of food provided. Furthermore, the classrooms are well-equipped, with 4-5 ceiling fans installed in each room to ensure adequate ventilation and a comfortable learning environment.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BA degree at CDLU?
overview_faqs.answer: CDLU fees for all BA degree include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. In the total course fee, some components are paid every semester, while some are one-time. The tution fee payable across the entire course duration of BA at CDLU ranges between INR 23,800 and INR 1 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is CDLU - Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
overview_faqs.answer: According to, students can choose from 21 specialized, career-oriented courses offered by CDLU. The university also offers distance learning courses that are focused on careers. The price of a degree at Sirsa, Haryana's Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) varies according to the particular programme and course. All courses at CDLU have annual fees ranging from Rs 13,000 to Rs 17,000. The cost information for particular programs, like the M.Sc. (Computer Science) programme, is also given; it ranges from Rs 3,000 to Rs 12,000 annually.The annual tuition for CDLU's B.Ed program is INR 2,400. The first year's CDLU fees for the MBA program are INR 22,400, and the second year's fees are INR 22,100. For two years, the MA CDLU fees are INR 11,500.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B Tech at CDLU - Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU), Haryana is NAAC accredited government university. It offers many courses to the candidates who want to take admission in CDLU. The annual tuition fees for the B.Tech course is INR 160000. The fees for the B.Tech course is quite affordable as compared to the B.Tech courses of other colleges. The eligibility criteria for the students who want to join the B.Tech course is that they must have scored more than 45% marks in their 12th board examination or any other equivalent 10+2 examination from any recognised education board of India. They admit students on the basis of their performance in the JEE Mains and HSTES entrance examination.

overview_faqs.question: Is CDLU good for BTech?
overview_faqs.answer: The University has disclosed the combined placement data for all the UG (3-year) courses. As per the NIRF report 2022, a total of 88 UG (3-year) students graduated in 2021. Out of these, only 3 were placed during 2021 placements. Further, the median package for UG (3-year) courses stood at INR 1.20 LPA. The past year's placement data is unavailable, hence, the comparison can not be illustrated. review_summary.college_name: CDLU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Honest review for engineering.

content.Placements: The course has just started so the 1st ever batch of the degree will graduate this year. Some students got placed in the 4th year only (off-campus mostly). There are minimal efforts from the university side, so students need to grind on their own for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The computers are there but no furniture. On paper there should be 3 labs in the department. But there is no proper computer lab in the department which is ironic because literally bachelors in computer science. The classes are okay, and other infrastructure is there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Sirsa.

content.Placements: 69% of students got placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, while the lowest was 3.6 LPA. Top banking institutions, leading industrial companies, and government organizations recruited students from the college. Around 37% of students from my course secured internships at HDFC Bank and Axis Bank. My personal goal was to become an IAS officer.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were available in my college. The library was very good, and the classrooms were very clean. No kind of garbage was found inside the college. There were large grounds for sports, science labs, and special rooms for resting. Wi-Fi was available throughout the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Honrs). - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of University College, Sirsa.

content.Placements: I was a student at one of the colleges in CDLU, Sirsa. It is a government college. There was a separate placement cell that organized placement from time to time. There are no companies in the city where I live but there are private banks that provide opportunities to students. The placement rate is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Unlike other government colleges, which often lack proper labs or computers, this college offers a good environment for students, including a computer lab with air conditioning and a spoken English lab where you can earn a free certificate. I was not a hostel student, but a friend of mine lived there. According to her, the hostel felt like a home, with well-maintained rooms, hygienic food, and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Honrs). - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college offers good infrastructure but no placement support is available.

content.Placements: The college does not offer placement assistance for undergraduate programs. As a result, there are currently no placement opportunities available within the department. Students are, therefore, expected to explore off-campus job opportunities. The institution also does not conduct regular placement drives. Occasionally, a company may visit once a year, but such opportunities are limited in scope.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers top-quality infrastructure, including well-maintained facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer laboratories, a canteen, and a library. These amenities are efficient and support students' academic needs effectively. The hostel facilities are also commendable, both in terms of infrastructure and the quality of food provided. Furthermore, the classrooms are well-equipped, with 4-5 ceiling fans installed in each room to ensure adequate ventilation and a comfortable learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Honrs). - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College offers good infrastructure and a vibrant campus life, making it enjoyable for students.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placement support for undergraduate courses. As a result, there are currently no placement opportunities available in our department. You will need to explore off-campus job options for recruitment. The college does not conduct regular placement drives. Occasionally, a company may visit once a year to offer some opportunities, but even those are limited.
content.Infrastructure: I would say the infrastructure is of top quality, including facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, canteen, and library. Everything is well-maintained and efficient. As for the hostel, both the infrastructure and the food provided are commendable. The classrooms are also well-equipped, with 4–5 fans each to ensure proper ventilation and comfort.

admission_process.title: CDLU Admission Process  2025

paragraphs: CDLU 2025is entrance-based. The university offers BSc, BCA, MBA, etc., UG and PG-level courses. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers PhD, BEd, MPhil, diploma, etc courses.CDLU admission portalis open now. To be admitted to the CDLU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at theChaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU)is conducted online. Chaudhary Devi Lal University's admission process includes registration as per entrance exam as per respective course. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in CDLU:
STEP 1: CDLU Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on entrance exam scores as per the respective entrance exam. Students are advised to keep the last educational documents for further verification process.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: in how many specialistaions MBA courses are offered at CDLU?
faqs.answer: A total of two MBA courses are offered namely, MBA General and MBA Hons at Chaudhary Devi Lal University. The eligibily criteria for the course is graduation with a 55% aggregate. To enrol for MBA course at CDLU, candidates must sit and appear for CMAT entrance exam.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Chaudhary Devi Lal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at Chaudhary Devi Lal University. CDLU offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation (common eligibility) to apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

college_info.college_name: CDLU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: According to, students can choose from 21 specialized, career-oriented courses offered by CDLU. The university also offers distance learning courses that are focused on careers. The price of a degree at Sirsa, Haryana's Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) varies according to the particular programme and course. All courses at CDLU have annual fees ranging from Rs 13,000 to Rs 17,000. The cost information for particular programs, like the M.Sc. (Computer Science) programme, is also given; it ranges from Rs 3,000 to Rs 12,000 annually.The annual tuition for CDLU's B.Ed program is INR 2,400. The first year's CDLU fees for the MBA program are INR 22,400, and the second year's fees are INR 22,100. For two years, the MA CDLU fees are INR 11,500.

Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU), Haryana is NAAC accredited government university. It offers many courses to the candidates who want to take admission in CDLU. The annual tuition fees for the B.Tech course is INR 160000. The fees for the B.Tech course is quite affordable as compared to the B.Tech courses of other colleges. The eligibility criteria for the students who want to join the B.Tech course is that they must have scored more than 45% marks in their 12th board examination or any other equivalent 10+2 examination from any recognised education board of India. They admit students on the basis of their performance in the JEE Mains and HSTES entrance examination.
CDLU provides more than 81 courses at UG, PG and other levels. The fees of a degree at Sirsa, Haryana's Chaudhary Devi Lal University (CDLU) varies according to the particular programme and course.
Course offered at Chaudhary Devi Lal University with it's course and fees in INR:
B.Ed 16,450 (1st Year Fees)
BA 25,000 (1st Year Fees)
M.Sc 12,400 (1st Year Fees)
BCA 25,000 (1st Year Fees)
B.Com 25,000 (1st Year Fees)
MBA 22,400 (1st Year Fees)
B.Tech 40,000 (1st Year Fees)
I hope it helps to get some insight.
All the best for your future.

In case a candidate decides to withdraw his/her admission in a particular programme offered at CDLU, the following fee refund conditions will apply: (i) If a candidate leaves any programme, the entire fee deposited by the candidate will be refunded upto September 30 after deducting processing fee of INR 1000
(ii) If the admission of a student is cancelled by the college, for no fault of his/her, the duespaid by him/her will be refunded
(iii) Caution money/Security Deposit is refundable if application is received by December 31 of the year of the completion of course.

review_summary.college_name: Shaikh-Ul-Hind Maulana Mahmood Hasan Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Studying in a medical college.

content.Placements: Every year, internship is being provided after the end of 4th year. The duration of internship is 12 months. The stipend for every year is 12,000 per month. After the internship, students can apply for JR (Junior Resident) ship after 5.5 years and can get a job in any department. The average salary of a JR is nearly 85,000 per month at the start.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. The classroom are equipped with fans, lights, centralised ACs, and there is a proper Library which has many rooms but not enough books. Wi-Fi is not available and, normal network is also poor. Hostels are okay. Quality of food in mess is below average.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There is nothing like placements in MBBS because after graduating with the MBBS degree it is students' choice whether they want to work to open their private clinics in government-run hospitals as non-academic junior residents or they opt for further studies by clearing PG entrance. Students can also join the government sector by clearing the UPSC and CMS exams, so options are many. Salary depends on the state in which students are doing their junior residency. So it is better to do residency than to start clinic just after MBBS.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility in our college is very good. Students will get double seaters rooms in the first year, and after that, they will be allotted single rooms. Rooms are also well maintained and cleaned as compared to other colleges. Mess is available in this college, and the food quality is also fine. Canteen is also provided, and lecture theatres are well maintained having good capacity. All lecture theatres are fully ventilated. Laboratories are also fully equipped. The library facility is good. There is a separate building for the library and almost all books are available there. Our campus is lush green, and students will not feel bored. Ground is also available where students can play various sports. Regular tests are conducted to keep students on track. Hospital facility is also good, and the patient load is increasing day by day. The infrastructure of hospital is also good, and all facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Studying in a medical college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice. The classroom are equipped with fans, lights, centralised ACs, and there is a proper Library which has many rooms but not enough books. Wi-Fi is not available and, normal network is also poor. Hostels are okay. Quality of food in mess is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility in our college is very good. Students will get double seaters rooms in the first year, and after that, they will be allotted single rooms. Rooms are also well maintained and cleaned as compared to other colleges. Mess is available in this college, and the food quality is also fine. Canteen is also provided, and lecture theatres are well maintained having good capacity. All lecture theatres are fully ventilated. Laboratories are also fully equipped. The library facility is good. T...

reviews.review_heading: We get good placements from the college and good exposure to patients with well-maintained condition
reviews.review_text: There are separate buildings for every department. The hospital and the college buildings are also separate. There are many playgrounds at our college. Our college has separate hostels for boys and girls. There is also the facility of the canteen in the college. The library of the college is also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college near Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: Every medical college needs an academic block. In some medical colleges, the academic blocks are very big. There are separate department with their laboratories and demonstration room is also available.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS makes you ready for everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay as it is a new medical College. Its 1st foundation batch is in 2015. there is a library but no Wi-Fi, not enough books, no A. C. and the Timings are 9 am to 6 pm. The hostel is good but there is no one to look after. The mess is not so good but it's the same in every hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, and it is good for PG preparation.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available anywhere. The infrastructure is good, but it is not maintained well. Classrooms are well-equipped. The library contains all the necessary books, but no extra books for entertainment. The food available in the mess and canteen is average. Sports facilities are above average.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a good environment, infrastructure, and good schedule.
reviews.review_text: It provides a new infrastructure with a very good position, a fully furnished room, and cool water available 24X7. Proper sanitation and cleaning are done on an alternative day in each hostel and corridor. Proper hygiene and discipline in the hostel are maintained by the warden.

reviews.review_heading: It is the average college but can give a try.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is above average. Wi-Fi is not available but classrooms are good with proper facilities. Labs are properly air-conditioned with every facility needed. Food in the mess is average but in the canteen is above average. The level of sports is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am averagely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice. Although there is no Wi-Fi available. But labs are cool with proper air conditioning. Classrooms are also good and neat and clean always with proper digital facilities. Mess is average and canteen is far better than expectations.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Although there is no Wi-fi available, the labs, classrooms, and library are good on campus. Labs are air-conditioned. All labs, classrooms, and the library are properly curtained and have enough space to accommodate students. The quality of food served in mess is average. But the food served in the canteen is above average.

reviews.review_heading: It's amazing and very soothing vibe here.
reviews.review_text: Decent classrooms were very spacious. We had labs according to the subjects, and they were neat and clean. Mess food was decent, and in the college itself we had canteen which had all basic needs including food, stationery, and tea and coffee which were necessity for doctors.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Karpagam College of Pharmacy offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. faqs.answer:
A:    Karpagam College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.PharmaShe/he Should registered in state pharmacy council as a registered Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act.Pharm.DCandidate shall have passed HSC examination with English as one of the subjects and Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Botany & Zoology or Mathematics subjects.
Vocational stream & National open school certificate is not eligible for admission.
Candidate shall have passed D.Pharmacy from an institution approved by Pharmacy Council of India under section 12 of the Pharmacy Act 1948.
Candidate should have completed 17 years of age on the date of admission or should complete the age of 17 years on or before 31st December of the year of admission.B.PharmaCandidate should have completed 17 years of age on the date of admission or should complete the age of 17 years on or before 31st December of the year of admission.

review_summary.college_name: Poddar Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Story for the best college.

content.Placements: Poddar Business School is dedicated to providing the best placement opportunities to students. It helps the student in pre-placement preparation and supports the student's placement journey. They can take the mock interview, soft skill training, and more. The average package is 7 LPA-9 LPA. The highest package this year is 24 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure with AC classrooms, well-equipped IT labs, a library, and a canteen with tasty food. Students can apply for hostel facilities. The hostel provides facilities like separate attached washrooms, a reading room, internet, and so on.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall satisfied with helpful faculty members, nice environment, decent placement, and good events.

content.Placements: I’m pursuing the BCA batch 2023-26 at Poddar International College. Around 70% of students from my course in the previous batch had an average package of about 3-4 LPA. The top roles offered were Software Engineering, Software Development, Web Development, and Data Analysis.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi facilities, well-maintained computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-managed library. There are hostel facilities on another campus. There are 3 campuses, and all are good. The canteen food is also good and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with outstanding faculty, infrastructure, and placements.

content.Placements: I am glad to say that I have completed two years in this college, and 1 month ago I participated in the placement session. 80 percent of students are placed in the BBA course. The top recruiting companies include Hike Education and DCB Bank. The highest package offered is 24 LPA, the lowest package is 6 LPA, and the average package is 9 LPA. They placed at least 70 percent of students from my batch. The average stipend provided is a minimum of Rs. 10,000. Top recruiting companies are Reliance, Byju's, Times of India, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Poddar International College is well-developed and student-friendly. It supports both academic and extracurricular activities. Campus is spacious, clean, and well-organized. Along with properly maintained classrooms equipped with projectors and smartboards.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Poddar - Education with a purpose to shape a better future.

content.Placements: Poddar Group of Institution is best for its strong placement team which mentors students on how to crack top companies with the proper skillset. 80% of students got placed in the last year. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Amazon, and HDFC. Roles offered are management trainee, analyst, and developer.
content.Infrastructure: College has good overall infrastructure, with best facilities, best classroom, smart classroom, and labs (IT, science, design, management ). Our college has the best accommodation facility. Food quality is hygienic. There is an auditorium for programs. Classrooms are air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an affordable B.Com course with supportive faculty and a decent campus life.

content.Placements: Placements for the B.Com course are decent and satisfactory. Around 60–65% of students get placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, the average package is about 3–3.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2–2.25 LPA. The main recruiting companies are banks and accounting firms. The placement experience is average but helpful for students who want to start their careers. Students with good communication skills and basic accounting knowledge have better chances of getting placed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the Poddar Group of Institutions is decent for B. Com students. Classrooms are clean, spacious, and well-ventilated with basic teaching facilities. Library has sufficient books and study material related to commerce courses. Hostel facilities are average but comfortable. Mess food is average, basic medical support is available, and hospitals are nearby. The college also offers sports facilities for games like cricket, badminton, and indoor activities. Overall, the infrastructure and hostel facilities are satisfactory and suitable for students.

admission_overview.college_name: Poddar Group of Institutions Admission 2026 (Open): Courses, Eligibility & Selection, Fee

admission_overview.title: Poddar Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Poddar Group of Institutions admissions are currently open. The institute offers courses, such as BBA, BCom, MCom, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers certificate, doctorate and diploma courses. To get admitted to the Poddar Group of Institutions, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by PGI. The college offers more than 50 courses (including specialisations) in the streams of Accounting and Commerce, Management Studies, Science, etc. The application process at PGI is conducted online. Admission to the courses is mostly based on the academic merit in the last qualifying exam. For MBA, students need to go through the Centralised Counselling Process of RMAP. Read the following sections to know all about the eligibility and admission process for Poddar Group of Institutions.

eligibility_selection.title: Poddar Group of Institutions Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Poddar Group of Institutions course admissions are based on preset admission criteria. The institute mainly offers merit-based admissions for its UG, PG, and Diploma courses. For certain courses, such as the MBA, counselling is conducted. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular Poddar Group of Institutions courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: MAT/CMAT/ATMA/GMAT, Poddar Combined Aptitude Test + PI ( For those who did not appear in any entrance exam)
Merit-based (direct and on a first come first serve basis)

faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission in Poddar Group of Institutions UG courses without entrance exam. The institute accepts students on merit basis for all of its UG programmes. Students can apply directly after Class 12 exam.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in Poddar Group of Institutions UG courses without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Poddar Group of Institutions eligibility vary depending on the course-level. The general eligibility is as below:Poddar Group of Institutions UG eligibility requires students to complete Class 12 from a recognised board Poddar Group of Institutions PG eligibility requires students to complete Bachelor's degree in relevant field from a recognised university
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Poddar Group of Institutions admission?

admission_process.title: Poddar Group of Institutions Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Poddar Group of Institutions's admission processincludes merit-based and preparation of a merit list of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the PGI Jaipur:
Poddar Group of Institutions Application 2026

Aspirants can apply for various courses at the official website. Students can submit the application form with details and documents listed. To submit the form, students need to pay an application fees. Candidates will have to appear for MAT/CMAT/ATMA/GMAT, Poddar Combined Aptitude Test + PI ( For those who did not appear in any entrance exam) for the MBA course.
Selection Rounds 2026

The selection criteria at PGI, Jaipur are based on entrance scores or merit-list preparation as per respective courses. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification set by the institute.
Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Students can checkPoddar Group of Institutions cutoffdetails here. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in MBA programme at PGI Jaipur?
faqs.answer: No, students cannot get direct admission for MBA course at Poddar Group of Institutions. The institute offers two-year MBA and PGDM programmes across multiple specialisations. Poddar Business School admission to both courses is completely entrance-based. Candidates can either qualify for national-level entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, etc., or appear for Poddar Combined Aptitude Test (PCAT) to participate in the selection process.

faqs.question: What is the weightage of various parameters for selection to the MBA course at Poddar Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Candidates are selected on the basis of marks secured in the entrance exam, personal interview, work experience (if any), and academic qualification for the PGDM programme at Poddar Group of Institutions. Candidates can refer to the table below to know the weightage of various parameters:ParameterWeightageCAT/ XAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAT/GMAT/PCAT Score40%Personal Interview30%Work experience, sports & extracurricular activities10%Academic Record (Class 10, Class 12, Graduation Degree)20%

The facilities in hostels are as the beds, chairs, an almirah, cooler room, and more. The hostel rooms are given on a first come first serve basis. The extra facilities can be availed based on additional payments. The hostel has Aircooled/Air conditioned, 24 Hours Guard, wifi facility.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing experience at PGI, good placements, infrastructure, faculty members, and events.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure with a resourceful library, apple lab, Wi-Fi, smart classroom, and many more. There are spacious classrooms with a standard student-to-teacher ratio. There are two IT labs and an apple lab for the students to research and practice different computer applications related technologies. The library here has a vast collection of books on diverse topics and has a sound environment where students can study with focus. Canteen is good and you can find beverages and snack...

reviews.review_heading: Design department - Poddar International College.
reviews.review_text: The design department is very well decorated with continuous updates in visual merchandise made by students. The classrooms and hostels are equipped with fast Wi-Fi networks, clean canteens, and restrooms. The food cooked is fresh and many packaged brands are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Here I found lots of opportunities and good education system along with many other activities.
reviews.review_text: Now, I would like to talk about our college infrastructure. In our college, all the departments like management, fashion, science, IT and arts have settled on different floors. This gives us the proper convenience to go anywhere, wherever we want. Everybody likes the fashion department infrastructure because it gives the beautiful and colorful vibes. The college also has a place for an auditorium downstairs of the reception area. It is a very beautiful and huge area.

reviews.review_heading: This is a respectable institution.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, a library, labs, and other facilities are provided by our college. There are sports and fitness activities, as well as health and wellness activities. Our college offers top-notch indoor and outdoor games, delicious food, and adequate medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: An affordable private college for pursuing Bachelors degree.
reviews.review_text: College campus provides us with hostel and mess facilities. The food quality provided in mess is very good. Classroom, labs, library are well-equipped and fully furnished. Campus is very environment friendly, you will get all shops for daily needs inside the campus. The professors are very experienced. Mess food is nice and affordable. Canteens are quite expensive. Bus facility is available for markets but most of the students use tier vehicle. Campus life is quite soothing. Even though it lacks...

reviews.review_heading: Golden years of my life.
reviews.review_text: Campus life is so good, and I'm very happy about it. The infrastructure of our college is beautiful, and the greenery is the main reason; it's everywhere, making our college more appealing. Our college has a library facility, and it's good, with a good availability of books and journals. We also have a canteen, and the food is nice. Amenities are pretty basic, as in all universities, and we have sports facilities with proper equipment. We have a lot of societies in our college, and auditions are...

reviews.review_heading: Poddar group of institution review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good and up to par. The library is huge and has a variety of books that would help with study projects and previous year's papers and guides are always available. You can get all your course books and novels in the library, along with some unique courses. There are three buildings, of which one is centralized air conditioned and all the classrooms have smart boards and blackboards. All the classrooms in the college have projectors, microphones, fans and many lights. ...

reviews.review_heading: Poddar groups of institutions, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The colleges faculty is always available many facilities of the related college and needs of students. Like we have a big room that is full of books and we called it library because it is fully study room. We have all types of books as competitive and academic books with critical thinking solve papers of previous year questions of exams. There are about many classrooms in our college and for each year of students. There are sports facilities present in our college. We are working on it extra cur...

paragraphs: Yes, Poddar Group of Institutions offers scholarships. Students can check the detailed scholarship stats from below:
On the basis of percent of Class 12 for UG & Graduation for MSC
BPL Card Holders will get a 10% scholarship for all three years

State Level Sports Achievers will be given a 5% scholarship for the first year and National Level Sports Achievers will be given a 10% Scholarship for the first year. This scholarship is continued in further years only if they earn sports achievements in further years too.
Siblings of our past/existing students will be given a 10% scholarship in the first year of tuition fees.
Poddar Graduates are to be given a 20% Scholarship on admission to MCA, MA, and MCom & 10% in MBA & MSc, MBA and MCA scholarships will on given RTU Fees (INR 60000 PA)

In order to submit the PGI Jaipur application form successfully, aspirants must pay the application fee. The fee payment can be done through credit card/debit card/net banking. highlights.summary:
The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Crescent College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offer courses like Pharm.D, D.Pharma, B.Pharma, M.Pharma with the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. Crescent College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: What kind of courses does Crescent College of Pharmaceutical Sciences offer for students?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with this college because of lack of placements.

review_content.Placements: Zero percentage of students are placed in this course from our college. Our college does not provide any placements for students. There are no tie-ups with recruiting companies with this college. Students looking for placements can look into better options.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in our college and hostel. Labs are average and provide almost facilities. There is a library with a lot of books. Classrooms are also average. There is no adequate amount of chairs for students. A proper exam hall is not available. The auditorium is used as the exam hall.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college and has no placement options.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't have any placement opportunities for graduated students. After completing the course, students find their jobs by themselves. None of the companies has recruited directly from our college. The graduated students gain experience in a pharmacy. After gaining enough experience, they go abroad or to a pharmaceutical company.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is a three-story building. It has different rooms for each batch. There are a total of 12 batches and different laboratories for each subject. Our college also has a large library that is very useful for the students as well as teachers. The college has an internet facility that can be availed from the computer lab. Students can download and print any documents related to our subjects. Our college has a canteen, and there would serve a variety of dishes. The quality of the food is good. Our college has an auditorium hall where events and programs are conducted. This auditorium hall has CCTV cameras, and the hall is also utilised as an exam hall. We also have a badminton court and a volleyball court.

The institute offers B.Pharma for 4 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Library is satisfactory. Pharmacology and basic sciences staffs are great.

review_content.Placements: They offer regular clinical postings, which will be useful during the internship period. And also internships. A college bus is arranged for postings. Postings are related to our department hospital. The person who takes operation theatre and anaesthesia technology is to maintain OT and assist anesthetist. I have to know how to handle advanced equipment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is nice and protected for girls. Food and water are hygienic. The hostel has free Wi-Fi. A hostel with a gym is available. Ground with a track. Basketball court. Indoors with many games. It has a temple. The hostel has three categories based on food and fees. It is worthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good patient flow.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Food served in the hostel is somewhat good but they don't provide proper food for breakfast and dinner. There is no proper water supply for hostelers for bathing.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good. Students can learn a lot from them. Class tests and seminars are conducted every week. They clear all the doubts of the students. Teachers provide proper notes for students to study. Teaching is good.
review_content.Other: Culturals are conducted in our college by seniors. Management of our college is money minded.

reviews.review_heading: Go for it, this college is very good, it also has a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: College has well-developed classrooms. In classrooms, there are digital screens and projectors. Labs are well-managed. Washrooms are clean, computers are average, attendance is taken by the biometric machines. Hostels are average. Canteen is also average.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, classrooms are well ventilated. Our college has a good library, and several books related to pharmacy are available. It also has general books, which are worth reading. The food served in the mess is good and nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its good placements for 2020, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was very good and the surrounding environment was very beautiful. It provides free Wi-Fi in this hostel. Laboratories were excellent, and the other 3 libraries of this college were provided. The mess was very good, and food was available, and medical facilities were available 24X7. There were 3 games played by this college like cricket, chess, and football.
